sglang.title: fix incorrect links in documentation
sglang.author: rchen19
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Some links on current Documenation contains links that are actually file path in the repository, e.g., https://sglang.readthedocs.io/en/latest/backend.html#docs/en/custom_chat_template.md, which should be pointing to the file docs/en/custom_chat_template.md in the repo, but on the website

vllm.title: [Kernel][Triton][AMD] Remove tl.atomic_add from awq_gemm_kernel, 2-5x speedup MI300, minor improvement for MI250
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The use of tl.atomic_add in the awq_gemm kernel causes massive slow-down on MI300.  Removing the use of tl.atomic_add improves performance significantly for MI300.  Very minor improvement for MI250.  No slow-downs anywhere else.
python benchmarks/benchmark_throughput.py  --input-len 2048 --output-le

vllm.title: [dbrx] refactor dbrx experts to extend FusedMoe class
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR refactors DbrxExperts to use FusedMoe as the base class with custom weight loader. This is useful to expose the existing features of FusedMoe class for this model.

vllm.title: [Kernel][Bugfix] Delete some more useless code in marlin_moe_ops.cu

vllm.bodyExcerpt: As @ElizaWszola points out, I missed something in #8573, and there's a bit more code that can be deleted.
